description:
fns_needing_host_ctx is declared as an empty HashSet at line 2305 and never populated.
Every .contains() call returns false. Three branches are permanently dead.

DECLARATION (delete both lines):
  line 2305-2306: let fns_needing_host_ctx: HashSet<FnId> = HashSet::new();

REMOVE FROM compile_fn SIGNATURE (line 3517):
  fns_needing_host_ctx: &HashSet<FnId>,

REMOVE FROM compile_fn CALL SITE (line 2858):
  &fns_needing_host_ctx,

SIMPLIFY SIX .contains() SITES:
  line 2773: let needs_host_ctx = fns_needing_host_ctx.contains(&f.id);
    -> needs_host_ctx always false; trace how it's used in build_fn_signature and delete/simplify there
  line 3792: if fns_needing_host_ctx.contains(&f.id) { Some(params[2]) } else { None }
    -> always None; replace entire if-else with None
  line 3857: if fns_needing_host_ctx.contains(&f.id) { (Some(...), ...) } else { (None, host_ctx_idx) }
    -> always else branch; simplify
  line 3694: if fns_needing_host_ctx.contains(&f.id) { ... } (dead branch, delete whole block)
  line 4201: if fns_needing_host_ctx.contains(callee) { ... } (dead branch, delete whole block)
  line 4483: if fns_needing_host_ctx.contains(callee) { ... } (dead branch, delete whole block)

ALSO: check build_fn_signature for needs_host_ctx usage and simplify there too.

cargo build must produce zero warnings. All tests must pass.
title: fz-cg2.1 remove fns_needing_host_ctx dead analysis
